summary: Frontend testing complete for Pipeline Hero Actions Carousel feature. All requested features verified working correctly. The hero card on 'My Schools' page is now an actions carousel, carousel navigation (prev/next buttons, dots) works, each slide shows school name, progress rail, badges, advice box, and CTA button. No separate 'Actions Needed Today' section exists below hero card - correctly merged. Kanban board, upcoming events, guidance banner, and Add School button all working.

issues: ERR_BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE.NotSameOrigin errors for external resources (university logos) - not blocking functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline page hero card successfully merged with actions carousel. Test token key is 'capymatch_token' in localStorage. Demo account 'Athlete (Emma)' auto-fills credentials. Login then navigate to /pipeline.

hero_actions_carousel: Hero card (data-testid='pipeline-hero-card') found and renders correctly
Carousel shows 6 action items/slides (6 dots visible)
Carousel prev button (data-testid='carousel-prev') found and clickable
Carousel next button (data-testid='carousel-next') found and clickable
Carousel dots (data-testid='carousel-dot-X') clickable and change slides
Each slide shows: school name, progress rail, badges (D1, Match %, Fit label), advice box, CTA button
CTA button (data-testid='hero-cta-btn') navigates to school journey page (/pipeline/{program_id})
no_separate_actions_section: Actions correctly merged INTO hero card carousel
kanban_board: 6 columns: Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offer, Committed
other_components: Upcoming events section (data-testid='upcoming-events') renders with 3 events
Guidance banner (data-testid='measurables-guidance-banner') renders with 'Improve your match accuracy'
Add School button (data-testid='add-school-btn') renders and navigates to /schools
theme_support: Theme toggle in header switches between themes
navigation: CTA button navigates to school journey page

verified_features: Hero card is now the actions carousel (pipeline-hero-card)
Carousel dots are clickable and change slides
Each slide shows school name, progress rail, badges, advice box, CTA
CTA button navigates to correct school journey page
No separate 'Actions Needed Today' section below hero
Kanban board renders correctly with 6 columns and 12 cards
Upcoming events section renders with 3 events
Page works in both light and dark themes
